title: inula × rigida var. vera
intro: Inula × rigida var. vera is a variety of the Inula rigida plant, also known as the giant elecampane or Russian inula, a perennial herb in the sunflower family native to Eastern Europe and Western Asia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Inula × rigida var. vera include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce inflammation and pain, and boost the immune system. In herbal preparations, Inula × rigida var. vera is often used in teas, tinctures, and infusions, and its roots can also be dried and used as a spice or added to soups and stews.
